chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – Al-Zahaar (likening the wife as a mother)

text: ابْنُ فَضَّالٍ عَمَّنْ أَخْبَرَهُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَا يَكُونُ الظِّهَارُ إِلَّا عَلَى مِثْلِ مَوْضِعِ الطَّلَاقِ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Fazzal, from the one who informed him,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The Zahaar does not happen except upon the similar place of the divorce’.
